features.name: class_inheritance_rand_member_base_handle
features.description: Code should include a rand member variable accessed through a base class handle in an inheritance chain, where the derived class is assigned to the base class handle.

features.name: rand_mode_disable_on_member_via_base_handle
features.description: Code should include calling rand_mode(0) on a rand member accessed through a base class handle, disabling randomization on that member variable.

features.name: constraint_with_inheritance_and_rand_mode_disable
features.description: Code should include a class with a constraint on a rand variable, where rand_mode is disabled on that variable through a base class handle, then randomize() is called.

features.name: constraint_evaluation_after_rand_mode_disable
features.description: Code should include a constraint being evaluated after rand_mode has been disabled on the constrained variable, triggering constraint resolution in the AST visitor.
